name: The Balance of Power
objective_notes: Arc entry via Minmatar standing; report to Abdiel Verat in K-QWHE — use interceptor for nullsec travel through potential bubble camps.

name: Mistaken Identity
objective_notes: Arc entry via Amarr standing; report to Abdiel Verat in K-QWHE — use interceptor for nullsec travel through potential bubble camps.

name: Headhunted
objective_notes: Arc entry via Angel Cartel standing; report to Abdiel Verat in K-QWHE — use interceptor for nullsec travel through potential bubble camps.

name: New Opportunities
objective_notes: Blitz: take gate and warp out — no kills required; room has 2–3 Sansha frigates and 2 elite cruisers but objective is recon only.
recommended_ship: T3 Destroyer or below (gate limit), EM/Thermal fit

name: Fight or Flight
objective_notes: Choose path: 'Serpentis Fill-In' leads to Chapter 2 Heaven; 'Natural Consequences' leads to Chapter 2 Utopia. No lasting impact on arc.

name: Serpentis Fill-In
objective_notes: Pick up the Sealed Research Cache (2 m³) from station before undocking — easy to forget; deliver to Serpentis Transport Hub Container.
recommended_ship: Interceptor (nullsec travel, cargo is only 2 m³)

name: Ride to the Rescue
objective_notes: Blitz: kill only Yukiro Demense (elite frigate); she webs and points — Kinetic weakest resist at 64%.
recommended_ship: Assault Frigate or T3 Destroyer (Kinetic/Thermal fit)

name: The Best Kind of Revenge
objective_notes: Do NOT destroy Cruise Missile Batteries — doing so triggers an additional -3.0% Guristas standing loss.
recommended_ship: Assault Frigate or T3 Destroyer (Kinetic/Thermal resist)

name: Wrath of Angels
objective_notes: Keep Yukiro Demense 40+ km from Remote-Repair Facility before attacking or it heals her; mission reward includes Domination Target Painter.
recommended_ship: Assault Frigate or T3 Destroyer (Kinetic/Thermal fit, long-range opener)

name: Natural Consequences
objective_notes: Later waves spawn on timers and can overlap with current wave; warp disruption present from wave 5 elite frigate.
recommended_ship: T3 Destroyer or below (gate limit), EM/Thermal fit

name: Clear the Way
recommended_ship: T3 Destroyer or below (gate limit), Kinetic/Thermal fit

name: Salvage Heist
objective_notes: Waves 1–3 triggered by damaging Gath Renton's shield, armor, and hull respectively — pull boss away from initial pack before shooting.
recommended_ship: T3 Destroyer or below (gate limit), Kinetic/Thermal fit

name: Rabbit Trap
objective_notes: Mission reward includes Domination Target Painter; boss Yukiro Demense (wave 3) webs -75% at 10 km, points to 24 km — Kinetic weakest resist.
recommended_ship: T3 Destroyer or below (gate limit), Omni or Kinetic focus for boss

name: Dominus
objective_notes: Agent handoff — report to Kadeja Dulche at K-QWHE VII Moon 8 Dominations Assembly Plant to switch mission chains.

name: The Lesser of Two
objective_notes: Choose path: 'Situation Normal' (two-mission stealth path, low standing loss) or 'Data Destruction' (direct one-mission assault, higher standing loss). No lasting impact.
recommended_ship: T3 Destroyer or below (gate limit for subsequent combat missions)

name: Situation Normal
objective_notes: Kill Boundless Creations Engineers (durable Stabber/Bellicose hulls), loot Security Codes, place in Communications Array to complete remotely.
recommended_ship: T3 Destroyer or below (gate limit), Explosive/Kinetic fit

name: Breaking the Lock
objective_notes: Three rooms of destroyers; gate tooltips lie — clear all ships to unlock each gate; destroying data centers costs -2.4% Minmatar Republic standing.
recommended_ship: T3 Destroyer or below (gate limit), Explosive/Kinetic fit

name: Data Destruction
objective_notes: Kill all ships in rooms 1–2 to unlock gates (tooltip lies); room 3 only needs data center destroyed; incurs ~-0.24% Minmatar standing total.
recommended_ship: T3 Destroyer or below (gate limit), Explosive/Kinetic fit

name: Fear of Angels
objective_notes: Solo vs Marshal Treonis (elite frigate, 27 m sig, 55% omni resists); loot CONCORD Star Emblem from wreck; use precision ammo; reward is Cynabal BPC.
recommended_ship: Assault Frigate or T3 Destroyer (precision ammo, fast orbit to beat tracking)
